name: Planeswalkers
blocker: no loyalty counter system or loyalty abilities

name: Auras that enchant a player or land, or move between hosts
blocker: only P/T-granting enchant-creature Auras are modeled

name: Multi-face cards (transform, modal double-faced)
blocker: the card model has a single face

name: Replacement effects
blocker: no replacement-effect layer in the rules engine
